name: Security - Content Safety Guardrails Enforcement
description: Ensures that the with_content_safety decorator enforces guardrails and blocks unsafe content in LLM output.
input: Simulate LLM output containing unsafe content (e.g., credentials, toxic code) and call sanitize_llm_output.
output: Sanitized output with unsafe content removed or flagged
success_criteria: Output is sanitized or error is raised
